seo.title: PII Filtering for AI Agents in Mastra Agents
seo.description: How to detect and fix pii filtering for ai agents in Mastra agents. Framework-specific detection, fixes, and Vex automation.

content.intro: In Mastra agents, PII Filtering failures occur when sensitive data like emails, phone numbers, or SSNs leak through workflow transitions, tool outputs, or memory retrievals without validation. This manifests uniquely due to Mastra's workflow step chaining and agent tool integrations, where unfiltered outputs propagate unchecked across the pipeline. Common failure modes amplify the issue, allowing PII to persist in agent memory and external integrations.

howItManifests.scenario: Workflow step outputs not validated between transitions
howItManifests.symptom: User's email address appears in subsequent workflow step inputs
howItManifests.impact: PII cascades through entire workflow, stored in Mastra memory

howItManifests.scenario: Agent tool calls returning malformed data
howItManifests.symptom: CRM tool returns customer phone numbers in raw JSON responses
howItManifests.impact: Agent includes unfiltered phone numbers in customer communications

howItManifests.symptom: Agent retrieves conversation history containing redacted PII
howItManifests.impact: Re-exposure of previously filtered sensitive information

howItManifests.scenario: Sync integration data causing agent confusion
howItManifests.symptom: Slack/Zapier sync injects user profile data with PII
howItManifests.impact: Agent processes and stores unfiltered integration payloads

detection.description: Intercepts Mastra agent tool calls and scans responses for PII before processing

detection.name: Memory Context PII Scanner
detection.description: Validates Mastra memory retrievals before injecting into agent context

fixes.name: PII Redaction Middleware
fixes.description: Mastra workflow middleware that automatically redacts PII before step transitions

fixes.name: Safe Tool Response Wrapper
fixes.description: Wraps Mastra agent tools to automatically sanitize outputs

fixes.name: PII-Safe Memory Filter
fixes.description: Filters Mastra memory before agent context injection

vexAutomation.heading: Automating PII Filtering for AI Agents Detection with Vex
vexAutomation.description:
Vex integrates directly into Mastra's agent pipeline as middleware, automatically detecting PII leaks across workflows, tool calls, memory retrievals, and integrations. It provides real-time monitoring with zero-config setup via npm install mastra @vex_dev/sdk, then adding a single middleware line to your Mastra workflows.

Vex employs ML-powered PII detection that adapts to your specific data patterns, combined with Mastra-native observability. It automatically generates remediation code, flags risky workflows, and provides audit trails for compliance. The platform scores each workflow step for PII risk and suggests optimal fix locations.

For production Mastra deployments, Vex offers automated remediation that injects PII filters without code changes, plus alerting for compliance violations across all agent runs.

cta.heading: Detect and Fix This Automatically with Vex
cta.description: Add Vex middleware to Mastra in one line and eliminate PII leaks forever - start your free trial at vex.dev/mastra
